name: Climate Risk Assessor
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for climate scenario narration, risk factor reasoning, portfolio impact analysis, and regulatory report generation

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput, real-time portfolio stress testing

services.name: Azure Machine Learning
services.purpose: Climate risk models — physical risk scoring, transition risk modeling, carbon price trajectories, catastrophe probability

prod.note: D4s_v3 cluster, scheduled retraining, model endpoints

enterprise.note: NC6s_v3 GPU cluster, ensemble models, hourly retraining

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Portfolio holdings, risk scores, scenario results, regulatory submissions, historical climate data indices

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Semantic search across TCFD/NGFS/IPCC frameworks, climate research papers, regulatory guidance, and precedent filings

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Risk API — scenario runner, portfolio analyzer, stress test engine, report generator, dashboard backend

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Climate datasets (IPCC, NOAA), scenario output archives, generated TCFD reports, audit-ready submissions

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, data provider credentials, signing certificates for regulatory filings, encryption keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Model accuracy tracking, scenario execution latency, API performance, risk score drift detection

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for standard risk summaries and data formatting, reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-scenario narrative analysis — saves 65% on AI costs
Pre-compute physical risk scores for common geographies and cache results — avoids re-running ML inference for repeated portfolio locations
Schedule ML model retraining during off-peak hours (weekends) — spot pricing reduces compute costs by 60-80%
Partition scenario results by time horizon (short/medium/long) in Cosmos DB — enables targeted TTL and avoids storing redundant intermediate results
Index TCFD/NGFS framework text once in AI Search and version-stamp — regulatory frameworks change annually, not daily
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
